hints.question: Where do I start?
hints.answer: Work through the TODO comments one at a time, starting from the top.

hints.question: How does symmetry work on the canvas?
hints.answer: If something's left edge is 20, its symmetrical right edge will be 80 (100 - 20).

hints.question: Why can't I get the nose to work?
hints.answer: You shouldn't add a new triangle for the nose - instead you should CHANGE the existing triangle to work correctly. You only need to change ONE value.
